sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106596" key="u(la/stria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑλάστρια</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n106596.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">she who gets</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fetches wood,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
